title: Lunen.ai: Build AI agents your whole team can run, and control | Product Hunt
excerpt: You've used ChatGPT and Claude for real work. They just do the task. No record of what they touched, no approval on the risky step, nothing you could hand your security team. Great UX, zero governance. Enterprise tools flip it: total control, an interface nobody wants to open. Lunen is what automated AI should be, the clean UX and the full transparency, not one or the other. Now in early access.
content_html: You've used ChatGPT and Claude for real work. They just do the task. No record of what they touched, no approval on the risky step, nothing you could hand your security team. Great UX, zero governance. Enterprise tools flip it: total control, an interface nobody wants to open. Lunen is what automated AI should be, the clean UX and the full transparency, not one or the other. Now in early access.

blocks.html_en: You've used ChatGPT and Claude for real work. They just do the task. No record of what they touched, no approval on the risky step, nothing you could hand your security team. Great UX, zero governance. Enterprise tools flip it: total control, an interface nobody wants to open. sentences.en: You've used ChatGPT and Claude for real work.
sentences.zh: 您已经在实际工作中使用了 ChatGPT 和 Claude。

sentences.en: No record of what they touched, no approval on the risky step, nothing you could hand your security team.
sentences.zh: 没有他们接触过的东西的记录，没有对危险步骤的批准，你无法向你的安全团队提供任何东西。
出色的用户体验，零治理。

sentences.en: Enterprise tools flip it: total control, an interface nobody wants to open.
sentences.zh: 企业工具翻转了它：完全控制，没有人愿意打开的界面。

sentences.en: Lunen is what automated AI should be, the clean UX and the full transparency, not one or the other.
sentences.zh: Lunen 是自动化人工智能应有的样子，干净的用户体验和完全的透明度，不是两者之一。
现在处于早期访问阶段。

content_html_zh: 您已经在实际工作中使用了 ChatGPT 和 Claude。 他们只是完成任务。 没有他们接触过的东西的记录，没有对危险步骤的批准，你无法向你的安全团队提供任何东西。 出色的用户体验，零治理。 企业工具翻转了它：完全控制，没有人愿意打开的界面。 Lunen 是自动化人工智能应有的样子，干净的用户体验和完全的透明度，不是两者之一。 现在处于早期访问阶段。
